name: Diamond Head
desc: Iconic volcanic landmark meets luxury oceanfront condos — postcard views, walkable to Kapiolani Park, prestigious addresses.
insider: Hike Diamond Head before 7am to skip the line — reservations are now required and slots fill up fast
The Gold Coast seawall path from Kaimana Beach Hotel to Outrigger is the best hidden sunset walk on Oahu
KCC Saturday farmers market (7:30–11am) is where chefs and locals actually shop — get the fresh poi
Free parking at Kapiolani Park lots on weekday mornings — walk to the crater trailhead from there
Diamond Head Market & Grill does a loco moco and blueberry scone that locals line up for every morning
The Gold Coast condos along the seawall are some of the most expensive per-square-foot in Hawaii — $1K+/sqft
Doris Duke's Shangri La Islamic art museum is hidden on the slopes — tours book out weeks ahead, reserve early
Kapiolani Park hosts free concerts, festivals, and the Honolulu Marathon finish line — check the events calendar
Parking at the crater costs $10 per car for non-residents — the walk up from KCC is free and only 15 minutes
The neighborhood is so quiet at night you can hear the surf from the Gold Coast condos
Diamond Head Lighthouse (1899) is still operational and one of the most photographed lighthouses in Hawaii — you can see it from the Gold Coast seawall path but the grounds are closed to visitors
